question: Did the participant give a time period for when the story took place (e.g., yesterday, last week, last month, etc)?
Did the participant specifically describe that this event took place ***last week***?
Did the participant identify a man's name as a character in the story? This should not be the name of a restaurant or store or the name of a dog.
Did the participant correctly identify the name ***Harry***? Also accepted is 'Harold' or 'Henry'.
Did the participant identify a woman's name as a character in the story? This should not be the name of a restaurant or store or the name of a dog.
Did the participant correctly identify the name ***Danielle***? Also accepted is 'Dani' or 'Danny'.
Did the participant identify a pet or animal in the story?
Did the participant correctly recall that the story was about a dog?
Did the participant identify that the animal or pet had a name, even if it is incorrect?
Did the participant correctly recall that the pet's name is ***Maddy*** or ***Maddie***? Also accepted is 'Madison' or 'Mary'.
Did the participant describe a general location where the story took place (e.g., in a park, on a playground, around a trail)?
Did the participant correctly recall that the event took place in a ***park***?
Did the participant describe the characters meeting with another person or group of people?
Did the participant recall that the characters ran into some old ***friends***?
Did the participant imply that the characters hadn't seen their friends in a long time?
Did the participant specifically recall that the characters hadn't seen their friends in ***years***?
Did the participant describe any action between the characters and another person or group of people?
Did the participant recall that the characters had a ***conversation*** with friends?
Did the participant describe anything that the characters were speaking to others about?
Did the participant correctly identify that the conversation was ***about their lives***?
Did the participant identify any plans made during the conversation?
Did the participant correctly recall that the friends decided to all go out to ***dinner***?
Did the participant identify when any plans were to take place?
Did the participant correctly recall that the date for the dinner was on ***Thursday***?
Did the participant describe a general location for where the characters planned to have a meal?
Did the participant correctly recall that the setting for the dinner was at ***Luigi's***?
Did the participant identify that something happened to the animal/pet?
Did the participant correctly recall that the dog Maddy or another animal had gotten out of her ***leash***?
Did the participant state a time that the characters noticed when the animal got out of her leash (e.g., while they were talking, after they said goodbye, in the afternoon)?
Did the participant correctly state that Maddy got out of her leash after they said goodbye to their friends?
Did the participant mention any actions taken by the characters to find something or someone?
Did the participant use the word ***searched*** to describe what the characters were doing?
keywords: searched;search;searching;looked for;look for;looking for;tried to find;trying to find
